# init(nsuuid:)

**Initializer**

Creates a Core Bluetooth UUID object from a Foundation UUID object.

## Declaration

```swift
init(nsuuid theUUID: UUID)
```

## Parameters

- **theUUID**: A UUID represented by an [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Foundation/NSUUID] object.

## Return Value

A new [doc://com.apple.corebluetooth/documentation/CoreBluetooth/CBUUID] object for the specified UUID.

## Creating New CBUUID Objects

- **init(string:)**: Creates a Core Bluetooth UUID object from a 16-, 32-, or 128-bit UUID string.
- **init(data:)**: Creates a Core Bluetooth UUID object from a 16-, 32-, or 128-bit UUID data container.
- **init(cfuuid:)**: Creates a Core Bluetooth UUID object from a Core Foundation UUID object.
